profile.name: Ronan McCormack, MSc
profile.title: Senior Analytics & Data Professional
profile.summary: Senior Analytics Professional with 10 years of experience transforming complex datasets into actionable business insights. Proven expertise in statistical modeling, predictive analytics, and data visualization, with a track record of delivering measurable impact for public and private organizations. Specializes in Python, R, SQL, and advanced analytics platforms.

experience.title: IT Governance & Reporting Specialist
experience.description: Leading enterprise IT analytics and governance reporting initiatives for BC's regional transportation authority. Developing executive Power BI dashboards, KPI frameworks, and predictive models while ensuring compliance with government reporting standards and data governance policies.

experience.title: IT Asset Management Specialist
experience.description: Managed comprehensive IT asset lifecycle including hardware procurement, deployment, tracking, and disposal across 1,800+ fleet vehicles and facilities. Developed standardized deployment processes and asset tracking systems that improved inventory accuracy by 95%.

experience.title: IT Administrator
experience.description: Managed enterprise data systems while developing analytical capabilities for operational decision-making. Created automated reporting solutions and built data quality monitoring frameworks.

experience.title: Computer Support Analyst
experience.description: Delivered comprehensive technical support for desktop, mobile, and enterprise applications across a multi-site transportation network. Improved first-call resolution rates by 25%.

experience.title: Technical Support Specialist
experience.description: Provided managed IT support services for 15+ small-to-medium business clients. Improved client system uptime by 20% through proactive monitoring and preventive maintenance.

experience.title: Systems Engineer
experience.description: Provided specialized technical support for point-of-sale systems across retail and hospitality clients. Maintained 99% system uptime during peak business periods.

experience.title: Systems Administrator
experience.description: Administered Windows/Linux server environments, network infrastructure, and backup systems. Reduced client system downtime by 40% through automated monitoring and preventive maintenance.

education.degree: Master of Science in Data Science
education.details: Specialized in advanced statistical computing, machine learning, and predictive analytics.
Foundation in computer science, systems administration, and network infrastructure.

projects.title: TeeSheets.ca - Golf Tee Time Search & Alerts
projects.description: Built and deployed a fully responsive web platform that allows golfers to search available tee times across multiple courses and receive real-time email alerts when desired slots open. Implemented an intuitive UI, custom domain configuration, and integrated EmailJS for automated notifications and contact handling.
projects.metrics: Reduced manual tee time checking by 90%

projects.title: EasyDoesIT.ca - Professional IT Support & Consultation
projects.description: Built a website for Easy Does IT, a Vancouver-based IT support business focused on serving individuals and small businesses. The site showcases services like hardware procurement, setup & installation, user training, system maintenance, and professional consultation. Includes a quote form, about & contact pages, service descriptions, and trust signals.
projects.metrics: Increased quote requests by 50% after launch.

projects.title: Vancouver Property Assessment Analytics
projects.description: Engineered property valuation analysis system using City of Vancouver open data. Processed 250K+ property records with predictive pricing models achieving 94% accuracy through machine learning algorithms.

projects.title: Crop Yield Prediction Using LSTM Networks
projects.description: Developed agricultural analytics system using Long Short-Term Memory neural networks to predict crop yields based on weather patterns, soil conditions, and seasonal data. Implemented deep learning models with TensorFlow/Keras.

footer.heading: Ready to Transform Your Data into Insights
footer.subtext: Available for analytics consulting, data science projects, and strategic advisory roles across Vancouver and remotely throughout North America.
